response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior generalist with ~18 years of software experience, deep TypeScript/Node.js skills, and genuine software-craftsmanship credentials (TDD, CI/CD, testing tools, workshops). However, his AI-specific experience is thin relative to the role's core bar: hands-on GenAI work appears limited to roughly one year at re:cinq (MCP code generators, agentic tooling), far short of the required 8+ years building production AI-driven solutions. There is no demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks, and cloud exposure (AWS CDK) is modest rather than AI-platform-centric. Strong engineer, wrong specialization depth for a Staff FDE GenAI role.
strengths: Recent hands-on MCP server/code-generator and agentic-workflow infrastructure work
18+ years full-stack production experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and AWS CDK
Proven mentorship and communication skills via workshops, courses, and conference talks
concerns: Falls well short of 8+ years building AI-driven production solutions
No evidence of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM evaluation/observability work
Limited demonstrated experience leading customer-facing technical discovery at enterprise scale
